testcase.name: test_worker_login
test_employer_login
test_otp_send_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 401 assert 401 in [200, 400, 500, 503] + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features.py:156: in test_otp_send_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code in [200, 400, 500, 503], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 401 E assert 401 in [200, 400, 500, 503] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
